zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand"於1333年出生在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫希斯特爾時，他的父親Jan V van Ghistelles23歲，母親Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes5歲。他和Marguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET)至少有4個女兒。他去世於1414年2月14日在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿古特享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand"于1333年出生在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫希斯特爾时，他的父亲Jan V van Ghistelles23岁，母亲Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes5岁。他和Marguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET)至少有4个女儿。他去世于1414年2月14日在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿古特享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand" was born in 1333, in Gistel, West Flanders, Belgium, his father, Jan V van Ghistelles, was 23 and his mother, Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes, was 5. He had at least 4 daughters with Marguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET). He died on 14 February 1414, in Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand" est né en 1333, à Gistel, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, son père, Jan V van Ghistelles, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes, avait 5 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 filles avec Marguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET). Il est décédé le 14 février 1414, à Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand" 1333 in Gistel, West-Flandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan V van Ghistelles 23 und seine Mutter Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes 5. Er hatte mit Marguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET) mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1414 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand" è nato il nel 1333 nel Gistel, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, il suo padre, Jan V van Ghistelles, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes, aveva 5 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figlie con Marguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET). Morì il 14 febbraio 1414, nel Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.Ghistelles: ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンギステル
ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand"が1333年にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンギステルで生まれた時，父Jan V van Ghistellesは23歳，母Isabelle Jeanne de Rodesは5歳であった。彼はMarguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET)との間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1414年2月14日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスアズインコウルトで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand"(이)가 1333년 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 지스텔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan V van Ghistelles(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes(은)는 5세였다. 그는 Marguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET)(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1414년 2월 14일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 아지쿠르트에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand" nasceu em 1333, em Gistel, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, seu pai, Jan V van Ghistelles, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes, tinha 5 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Marguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET). Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1414, em Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand" родился в 1333 г. в местности гистел, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Jan V van Ghistelles было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes, 5. У него было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Marguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET). Он умер 14 февраля 1414 г. в местности азинкоурт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Ghistelles VI "le Grand" nació en 1333, en Gistel, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, su papá, Jan V van Ghistelles, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabelle Jeanne de Rodes, tenía 5 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Marguerite van REIGHERSVLIET (REINGLESET). Murió el 14 de febrero de 1414, en Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 81 años.
